description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with press buttoned cuffs and a mid press buttoned flap, patch pocket on the left chest with a zipped closure and a small tag, patch on the shoulders with one loop, a full buttoned and concealed zipped placket and a curved hemFitSlim fitWash careHand wash or machine wash cold below 30 degrees using a mild detergentFlat dry in shadeDo not wring or bleachWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or denims and style it with understated accessories.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
